name: Bhavana S
profile_summary: I'm a passionate Software Engineering student at VIT with a strong interest in AI, Machine Learning, Full Stack Development, and intelligent digital experiences. I love building impactful solutions that blend creativity, functionality, and real-world problem solving. I'm especially driven by sustainability-focused AI research, intelligent automation, and creating meaningful user-centered technology.
technical_skills: Programming Languages - Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C, C++
Frontend Development - React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, Vite, Responsive Web Design
Backend Development - Node.js, Express.js, Flask, RESTful APIs, API Integration
AI / Machine Learning - Machine Learning, Deep Learning, OpenCV, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, LSTM, Random Forest, Gemini API, LangChain, RAG, LLM Applications
Database & Cloud - MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, Supabase, Vector Databases (Chroma)
DevOps & Developer Tools - Git, GitHub, Docker, Kubernetes, Postman, Vercel, VS Code
Automation & Data Processing - Web Scraping, Puppeteer, Cheerio, N8N, Data Preprocessing, Time-Series Analysis
Core Concepts - Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks
Soft Skills - Communication, Leadership, Problem Solving, Team Collaboration, Teaching & Mentorship

experience.description: Developed and managed web pages and digital resources for the institution while supporting technology-driven classroom activities. Conducted communication skill development sessions for students and collaborated with educators on interactive learning initiatives.
Contributed toward predictive maintenance approaches for solar infrastructure in polluted regions and supported sustainability-focused AI research using models like LSTM and Random Forest.

projects.title: AI Autonomous Food Monitoring System
points: Developed an AI-powered food monitoring system using OpenCV and Gemini API for intelligent food detection and tracking.
Implemented computer vision techniques for real-time food recognition and autonomous monitoring workflows.
Integrated AI-based analysis to improve food classification accuracy and monitoring efficiency.
Designed a scalable system architecture for smart food management applications.

projects.title: AI Counterfeit Detection using Blockchain
points: Built an AI + Blockchain-based counterfeit detection system for product authenticity verification.
Implemented intelligent validation mechanisms to identify counterfeit products using AI models.
Integrated blockchain concepts for secure product verification and tamper-resistant record management.
Focused on improving transparency and trust in product authentication workflows.

projects.title: Memory Retention & Prediction Model
points: Built a predictive machine learning model to analyze memory retention patterns and behavioral trends.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation using real-world datasets.
Implemented AI-driven prediction techniques to improve retention analysis and behavioral forecasting.
Focused on intelligent pattern recognition and data-driven decision-making approaches.

projects.title: Solar Panel Efficiency Prediction using AI/ML
points: Developed predictive AI/ML models to estimate solar panel efficiency loss caused by pollutant deposition.
Built Random Forest and LSTM models to analyze the impact of PM2.5, carbon monoxide, and dust on solar energy generation.
Worked with real-world environmental and solar datasets involving preprocessing, feature engineering, and time-series analysis.
Contributed toward sustainability-focused predictive maintenance solutions for solar infrastructure in polluted regions.

course_certifications: Full Stack JAVA Certification from IIT-Guwahati
volunteer_experience: Senior Core Member at LEO CLUB VIT Vellore

education.degree: M.Tech Integrated in Software Engineering, VIT Vellore
